cards.back: An open-source automation tool that allows IT professionals to define and apply configuration using YAML or JSON files
A configuration management tool that automates the setup, configuration, and management of servers and infrastructure

An open-source automation tool that automates the deployment, configuration, and management of servers and infrastructure
